exploration_notes: The task explicitly names 3 files to modify. The bug is in `onClusterAddOrUpdate()` in udp_proxy_filter.cc at lines 43-55, where `emplace()` silently fails when a cluster with the same name already exists (it doesn't overwrite). The fix must use `insert_or_assign` or erase-then-emplace to replace stale entries in the `cluster_infos_` map for both per-packet-load-balancing and sticky-session code paths. The header file (udp_proxy_filter.h) declares the map and method but is not part of the change
